meaning: n.[数]古戈尔普勒克斯(即10的古戈尔次方)
examples: If that's not mindboggling enough, a "googolplex" is a number with a googol number of zeros.
And there was an even better word, a real beauty-a googolplex. A googolplex was ten multiplied by ten a googol number of times.
It is too large to be written in scientific notation and is much larger than a googol, googolplex, and is even larger than Moser's number, another very large number.
So, let us say that I had signed an agreement with a friend, that he pay me a googolplex of dollars under certain conditions, would that make the situation exponentially worse?
